attributes.description: Overview of Alert Finding assets in Axonius.

params.markdown:
**Overview**

This dashboard provides a comprehensive view of Alert Findings Assets collected from Axonius.

It highlights the alert findings observed across the environment, giving immediate visibility into the most frequent and high-impact security events. A breakdown of alerts by severity and status helps analysts quickly understand the proportion of critical, high, medium, and low-level findings, along with how many alerts are open, or closed.

Time-based trends and top source tables provide further context, helping teams identify recurring trouble areas and understand which systems or integrations generate the most alerts. These perspectives help analysts detect emerging threats, assess incident impact, and prioritize response efforts efficiently.

**Note:** Assets deleted from Axonius may reappear in a future discovery cycle if they are still present in connected data sources and get re-detected. Because the exact duration for which a deleted asset may remain dormant before being rediscovered is unknown, the transform retention period is set to **90 days** to reduce the risk of data loss for such assets. This means deleted assets will continue to appear in dashboards for up to 90 days after deletion.

**[Integration Page](/app/integrations/detail/axonius)**

attributes.title: [Logs Axonius] Alerts Findings
